hero.subtitle: We help businesses go digital with fast websites, ranked on Google and designed to sell. Direct contact, honest prices and real technology.

problems.tag: The Problem Your Business Has Right Now
problems.title2: Professional Web Design and Local SEO

card1.title: Without a Professional Website, Google Doesn't Know You Exist
card1.desc: 89% of consumers search online before buying. If your business doesn't appear in the first Google results, you simply don't exist for your potential customers.

card2.title: Poor Web Design Drives Away Your Customers
card2.desc: You have less than 3 seconds to make a good impression. A website that loads slowly, doesn't work on mobile or looks abandoned makes customers leave before reading anything.

card3.title: With Local SEO You Appear on Google Without Paying for Ads
card3.desc: Appearing when someone searches for your service in your city doesn't require ads. With a well-optimized website, customers find you on their own — and that traffic never stops.

services.tag: What We Can Do for You
services.subtitle: No jargon, no fine print. Professional web design, local SEO and custom development so your business appears on Google and attracts customers — anywhere in Spain.

s1.title: Professional Web Design for Your Business
s1.desc: Your business online with a modern, fast and mobile-friendly design. That looks good, loads fast and converts visits into customers from day one.

s2.title: SEO and Google Ranking
s2.desc: Appear when your customers search for you. We optimize your website so Google shows you before your competition, without paying for advertising.

s3.title: Online Store and E-commerce
s3.desc: Sell your products 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Complete stores with shopping cart, secure payment and easy management — without needing technical knowledge.

s4.title: Website Redesign and Optimization
s4.desc: Is your website outdated or not working well? We modernize, speed up and optimize it so it stops driving customers away and starts attracting them.

s5.title: Custom Applications and Tools
s5.desc: Online bookings, CRM, order management, digital catalogs — if you have a manual process that wastes your time, we automate it for your business.

s6.title: Digital Consulting Without Commitment
s6.desc: Don't know where to start or what you really need? We help you understand it without pressure. First consultation always free.

diff.tag: Why Choose Us as Your Web Agency
diff.title: Web Development and SEO by Engineers, Without Intermediaries
diff.subtitle: No agencies, no intermediaries, no salespeople. You talk to the person who develops your website from the first day to the last.

d1.title: Real Experience in Web Projects and Technology
d1.desc: We have worked leading development teams in tech companies. We apply those same practices and standards to your project, regardless of its size.

d2.title: Modern Technology, Fast and Scalable Website
d2.desc: We use React, Next.js and Node.js — the same technology used by Google or Netflix. Your website will load in less than 1 second and be ready to grow with you.

d3.title: Direct Contact, Honest Prices
d3.desc: No inflated budgets or fine print. We explain exactly what you're going to receive, how much it will cost and when it will be ready — before you sign anything.

d4.title: Local SEO and Web Design Adapted to the Spanish Market
d4.desc: Spanish payment gateways, adapted invoicing, local SEO in Spain and availability for face-to-face or video call meetings throughout the peninsula.

process.title1: How We Create Your Professional Website
process.title2: from Zero to Published in 30 Days

s1.title: Free Consultation About Your Web Project
s1.desc: We start by listening to you. We analyze your business, your competition and what you really need — without jargon and without commitment. You decide if we move forward.

s2.title: Clear Proposal with Fixed Price and Deadline
s2.desc: You receive a detailed budget with exactly what's included, what it will cost and when it will be ready. No surprises, no hidden costs.

s3.title: Web Development with Weekly Updates
s3.desc: We work on your project and keep you informed at all times. You'll see real progress every week and can give us feedback before it's too late.

s4.title: Review and Adjustments Before Launch
s4.desc: Before publishing anything, we review every detail together. Speed, design, texts, forms — everything has to be perfect and you have to be 100% satisfied.

s5.title: Website Launch and Ongoing Support
s5.desc: We publish your website and don't disappear. We train you so you can manage it, resolve doubts and remain available for any future improvements.

cases.tag: Web Design and SEO Projects Completed

c1.title: WeClean
c1.desc: We designed and developed their website from scratch 10 months ago. In less than a year it has accumulated more than 7,000 impressions on Google and ranks for key local searches like 'cleaning company in Torrevieja' — with SEO still in growth phase.

c2.title: TaxiTime Torrevieja
c2.desc: We developed their website 2 years ago for this local taxi company in Torrevieja. Today it generates more than 415,000 annual impressions on Google, average position 4 and CTR of 2.2% — dominating high-volume searches like 'taxi Torrevieja'.

c3.title: Sanaja Beauty
c3.desc: Web design for beauty and massage center in Alicante. In the last 12 months: 32,000 Google impressions, 5.3% CTR — well above the industry average — and average position of 6. Organic results without advertising investment.

tech.title1: Web Development with Next.js and React:
tech.subtitle: We use Next.js, React and Node.js to create websites that load in less than 1 second — the same stack as Google or Netflix — adapted to your business budget. Loading speed is a ranking factor on Google.

cta.title2: that Ranks on Google from Day One?

consent.title: 🍪 Use of Cookies
consent.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze our website traffic. By accepting, you help us improve our services.

section1.title: 1. What are cookies?
section1.text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet or mobile) when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to site owners.

section2.title: 2. What cookies do we use?
section2.text: At Corexia we use the following types of cookies:
items: Essential cookies: Necessary for the basic functioning of the website. They include session cookies and language preference cookies.
Performance cookies: They allow us to analyze how visitors use our website to improve its operation. They collect information anonymously.
Functionality cookies: They allow us to remember the choices you make (such as your preferred language) to provide a more personalized experience.
Marketing cookies: They are used to track visitors across websites with the intention of displaying relevant and engaging ads for the individual user.

section3.title: 3. Third-party cookies
section3.text: Some of our partners and service providers may set cookies on your device when you visit our website. These third parties include web analytics services and external content providers. We have no control over the cookies that these third parties set. We recommend that you consult the privacy policies of these third parties for more information.

section4.title: 4. How to control cookies?
section4.text: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies that are already on your device and configure most browsers not to accept them. However, if you do this, you may have to manually adjust some preferences each time you visit a site and some services and functionalities may not work properly.

section5.title: 5. Browser settings
section5.text: Most web browsers allow some control of cookies through browser settings. For more information about cookies, including how to see what cookies have been set and how to manage and delete them, visit your browser settings.
items: Google Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies
Mozilla Firefox: Options > Privacy and security
Microsoft Edge: Settings > Privacy, search and services

section6.title: 6. Changes to this policy
section6.text: We may update this cookie policy periodically to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for other operational, legal or regulatory reasons. We recommend that you review this page regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies.

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.text: If you have questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at hello@corexia.es or through our contact page.
